roleArn.description: The ARN that specifies the IAM role that Amazon Inspector uses to access your AWS account.

valid.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether the IAM role has the necessary policies attached to enable Amazon Inspector to access your AWS account.

registeredAt.description: The date when the cross-account access role was registered.

assessmentRunArns.description: A list of ARNs that specifies the assessment runs that are returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

assessmentTargetArns.description: A list of ARNs that specifies the assessment targets that are returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

assessmentTemplateArns.description: A list of ARNs that specifies the assessment templates returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

resourceArn.description: The ARN of the assessment template that is used during the event for which the SNS notification is sent.

topicArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Simple Notification Service (SNS) topic to which the SNS notifications are sent.

findingArns.description: A list of ARNs that specifies the findings returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

rulesPackageArns.description: The list of ARNs that specifies the rules packages returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

failedItems.description: Attribute details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

assessmentTargetArn.description: The ARN that specifies the assessment target that is created.

assessmentTemplateArn.description: The ARN that specifies the assessment template that is created.

previewToken.description: Specifies the unique identifier of the requested exclusions preview. You can use the unique identifier to retrieve the exclusions preview when running the GetExclusionsPreview API.

resourceGroupArn.description: The ARN that specifies the resource group that is created.

failedItems.description: Assessment run details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

name.description: The auto-generated name for the assessment run.

assessmentTemplateArn.description: The ARN of the assessment template that is associated with the assessment run.

rulesPackageArns.description: The rules packages selected for the assessment run.

userAttributesForFindings.description: The user-defined attributes that are assigned to every generated finding.

completedAt.description: The assessment run completion time that corresponds to the rules packages evaluation completion time or failure.

stateChangedAt.description: The last time when the assessment run's state changed.

dataCollected.description: A Boolean value (true or false) that specifies whether the process of collecting data from the agents is completed.

stateChanges.description: A list of the assessment run state changes.

notifications.description: A list of notifications for the event subscriptions. A notification about a particular generated finding is added to this list only once.

findingCounts.description: Provides a total count of generated findings per severity.

failedItems.description: Assessment target details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

arn.description: The ARN that specifies the Amazon Inspector assessment target.

name.description: The name of the Amazon Inspector assessment target.

resourceGroupArn.description: The ARN that specifies the resource group that is associated with the assessment target.

createdAt.description: The time at which the assessment target is created.

failedItems.description: Assessment template details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

assessmentTargetArn.description: The ARN of the assessment target that corresponds to this assessment template.

durationInSeconds.description: The duration in seconds specified for this assessment template. The default value is 3600 seconds (one hour). The maximum value is 86400 seconds (one day).

rulesPackageArns.description: The rules packages that are specified for this assessment template.

userAttributesForFindings.description: The user-defined attributes that are assigned to every generated finding from the assessment run that uses this assessment template.

lastAssessmentRunArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the most recent assessment run associated with this assessment template. This value exists only when the value of assessmentRunCount is greaterpa than zero.

assessmentRunCount.description: The number of existing assessment runs associated with this assessment template. This value can be zero or a positive integer.

createdAt.description: The time at which the assessment template is created.

failedItems.description: Exclusion details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.
Finding details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this data type.

serviceAttributes.description: This data type is used in the Finding data type.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this data type.

assessmentRunArn.description: The ARN of the assessment run during which the finding is generated.

rulesPackageArn.description: The ARN of the rules package that is used to generate the finding.

assetType.description: The type of the host from which the finding is generated.

assetAttributes.description: A collection of attributes of the host from which the finding is generated.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this data type.

agentId.description: The ID of the agent that is installed on the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

autoScalingGroup.description: The Auto Scaling group of the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

amiId.description: The ID of the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that is installed on the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

hostname.description: The hostname of the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

ipv4Addresses.description: The list of IP v4 addresses of the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

tags.description: The tags related to the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

networkInterfaces.description: An array of the network interfaces interacting with the EC2 instance where the finding is generated.

severity.description: The finding severity. Values can be set to High, Medium, Low, and Informational.

numericSeverity.description: The numeric value of the finding severity.

confidence.description: This data element is currently not used.

indicatorOfCompromise.description: This data element is currently not used.

userAttributes.description: The user-defined attributes that are assigned to the finding.

createdAt.description: The time when the finding was generated.

failedItems.description: Resource group details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

tags.description: The tags (key and value pairs) of the resource group. This data type property is used in the CreateResourceGroup action.

createdAt.description: The time at which resource group is created.

failedItems.description: Rules package details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

version.description: The version ID of the rules package.

status.description: Specifies the status of the request to generate an assessment report.

url.description: Specifies the URL where you can find the generated assessment report. This parameter is only returned if the report is successfully generated.

previewStatus.description: Specifies the status of the request to generate an exclusions preview.

exclusionPreviews.description: Information about the exclusions included in the preview.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameters is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

scopes.description: The AWS resources for which the exclusion preview pertains.

attributes.description: The system-defined attributes for the exclusion preview.

messageType.description: A specific type of behavioral data that is collected by the agent.

count.description: The count of messages that the agent sends to the Amazon Inspector service.

dataSize.description: The data size of messages that the agent sends to the Amazon Inspector service.

assessmentRunAgents.description: A list of ARNs that specifies the agents returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

agentId.description: The AWS account of the EC2 instance where the agent is installed.

assessmentRunArn.description: The ARN of the assessment run that is associated with the agent.

agentHealth.description: The current health state of the agent.

agentHealthCode.description: The detailed health state of the agent.

agentHealthDetails.description: The description for the agent health code.

autoScalingGroup.description: The Auto Scaling group of the EC2 instance that is specified by the agent ID.

telemetryMetadata.description: The Amazon Inspector application data metrics that are collected by the agent.

exclusionArns.description: A list of exclusions' ARNs returned by the action.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameters is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

tags.description: A collection of key and value pairs.

value.description: A value assigned to a tag key.

nextToken.description: When a response is generated, if there is more data to be listed, this parameter is present in the response and contains the value to use for the nextToken parameter in a subsequent pagination request. If there is no more data to be listed, this parameter is set to null.

hostname.description: The hostname of the EC2 instance on which the Amazon Inspector Agent is installed.

agentId.description: The ID of the EC2 instance where the agent is installed.

autoScalingGroup.description: The Auto Scaling group for the EC2 instance where the agent is installed.

agentHealth.description: The health status of the Amazon Inspector Agent.

agentVersion.description: The version of the Amazon Inspector Agent.

operatingSystem.description: The operating system running on the EC2 instance on which the Amazon Inspector Agent is installed.

kernelVersion.description: The kernel version of the operating system running on the EC2 instance on which the Amazon Inspector Agent is installed.

ipv4Address.description: The IP address of the EC2 instance on which the Amazon Inspector Agent is installed.

failedItems.description: Attributes details that cannot be described. An error code is provided for each failed item.

assessmentRunArn.description: The ARN of the assessment run that has been started.
